# Neutrino Case Studies

The final block is meant to assemble the earlier tools into a small set of physical
examples. Neutrino analyses are a good target because they naturally combine event
counts, spectral fits, parameter constraints, and systematic effects.

For now this chapter only needs a working scaffold to host a toy oscillation fit, a
counting experiment with background, and a comparison between several statistical
procedures applied to one model.

::: {.notebook-card}
### Companion notebook

The companion notebook plots a simple oscillation-like curve and reserves space for
a later toy fit analysis.

<div class="notebook-actions">
  <a class="notebook-link notebook-link-primary" href="../notebooks/neutrino_cases_demo.qmd">Open notebook</a>
</div>
:::
